settings.heading: Information We May Collect
settings.body:
• Contact information
  • Billing and shipping details
  • Order history
  • Website usage information

settings.heading: How We Use This Information
settings.body:
• Process your orders
  • Improve our services
  • Provide customer support
  • Communicate important updates

We do not sell your personal information to third parties.

settings.heading: Your Privacy Matters
settings.intro: We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information.
